## Type of Documentation

- [ ] User Guide (how to use a feature)
- [ ] Developer Guide (architecture, implementation details)
- [ ] API Documentation (endpoints, schemas)
- [ ] Quick Reference (one-pager)
- [ ] Tutorial (step-by-step guide)
- [ ] FAQ/Troubleshooting
- [ ] Architecture Decision Record (ADR)
- [ ] Runbook (operational procedures)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Document written and reviewed
- [ ] Examples/code snippets included (if applicable)
- [ ] Links to related documentation verified
- [ ] Tone and formatting consistent with existing docs
- [ ] Markdown valid and renders correctly
- [ ] Merged to main branch
